scripts.lint: tsc -b packages/typescript/spec packages/typescript/engine packages/typescript/documents-base packages/typescript/documents-text packages/typescript/documents-markdown packages/typescript/documents-preview packages/typescript/validation packages/typescript/api-types packages/typescript/google-workspace && prettier --check "packages/typescript/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,mjs,cjs}" "apps/web/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,mjs,cjs}"
scripts.build: node packages/typescript/spec/scripts/embed-schemas.mjs && tsc -b packages/typescript/spec packages/typescript/engine packages/typescript/documents-base packages/typescript/documents-text packages/typescript/documents-markdown packages/typescript/documents-preview packages/typescript/validation packages/typescript/api-types packages/typescript/google-workspace && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.build:packages: node packages/typescript/spec/scripts/embed-schemas.mjs && tsc -b packages/typescript/spec packages/typescript/engine packages/typescript/documents-base packages/typescript/documents-text packages/typescript/documents-markdown packages/typescript/documents-preview packages/typescript/validation packages/typescript/api-types packages/typescript/google-workspace
scripts.build:pages: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter web build:pages
